parameters.subject: Dynasty Investments — Private Lending & JV Opportunity Overview
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.name }},

Thank you for your interest in partnering with Dynasty Property Investments.

We specialize in distressed property acquisition, renovation, and disposition in St. Francois County, MO — generating consistent returns for our capital partners.

Opportunity Highlights:
- Target Returns: 12–18% annualized
- Typical Hold: 3–9 months
- Secured by real property
- Monthly reporting and full transparency

A member of our team will reach out within 24 hours to schedule a call.

— Dynasty Property Investments
{{ $env.COMPANY_PHONE }}

parameters.jsonBody: {"activity_type": "Task Created", "description": "Schedule investor qualification call within 24 hours"}
